description_long: This object is a long, slender, and slightly curved blade, resembling a traditional sword or large knife. The blade appears to be forged from dark metal, with a consistent width along most of its length and a pronounced curve towards the tip. One end terminates in a hooked tip, while the other end features a thicker, rounded section that serves as the handle. The handle is integrated into the blade, lacking any visible wrapping or grip texture, and there is no crossguard present. The surface of the object is smooth and metallic, with a dark, almost black coloration and subtle variations in tone. There are no visible decorative elements or engravings on either the blade or handle.
description: A long, curved, dark metal blade with a hooked tip and a simple, rounded handle. The surface is smooth and unadorned, with no visible guard or ornamentation.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length and curvature of the blade, with the hooked tip and rounded handle clearly visible.
description_view_1: End-on view emphasizing the curve of the blade and the thickness of the handle section.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, again highlighting the blade's curve and the simple, unadorned handle.
description_view_3: View from the handle end, showing the blade's arc and the lack of a guard or grip texture.
attribute_handle_design: integrated, rounded, smooth metal, no visible grip texture
